title: rlwrap
html:
rlwrap

File Write

This adds timestamps to the output file. This relies on the external `echo` command.

rlwrap -l /path/to/output-file echo DATA

Shell

rlwrap /bin/sh

SUID override:

rlwrap /bin/sh -p
excerpt: rlwrap File Write This adds timestamps to the output file. This relies on the external `echo` command. rlwrap -l /path/to/output-file echo DATA Shell rlwrap /bin/sh SUID override: rlwrap /bin/sh -p
